title: ESL Teams Tournament 2019 Edition
excerpt: The annual ESL teams tournament went off without a hitch a couple weekends ago. Spirits were high and teams were in full party mode as-per usual. Thank you to Julia Smith for running this event as always. If you missed out this year, then be sure to keep an eye out for registration next year!
content:
The annual ESL teams tournament went off without a hitch a couple weekends ago. Spirits were high and teams were in full party mode as-per usual.

Thank you to Julia Smith for running this event as always. If you missed out this year, then be sure to keep an eye out for registration next year!
